# Meraki Cafe Lusaka

Homemade cafe and cakery operating since 2008 with three branches in Lusaka, Zambia.

## Branches
- Meraki Rhodespark — Plot 12, Chindo Road, Rhodespark, Lusaka — +260 977 000 001
- Meraki Eastpark — Eastpark Mall, Great East Road, Lusaka — +260 977 000 002
- Meraki Kabulonga — Shop 4, Kabulonga Road, Lusaka — +260 977 000 003

## Hours
Open every day 07:00–21:00. Kitchen closes 30 minutes before we do.

## Menu categories
- All-day breakfast
- Burgers
- Bowls
- Smoothies
- Coffee & drinks
- Sweets
- Celebration cakes (order by 12:00 for next-day collection)

## AR menu
Every dish on the site can be viewed at true real-world size in AR from any modern iPhone or Android — no app required.

## Currency
All prices are in Zambian Kwacha, formatted as K450.
